task_completion.description: Verify that building management bookmarks are organized into the specified folders.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Chrome bookmark bar or Bookmark Manager showing exactly four specific folders: 'HVAC', 'Security', 'Lighting', and 'Parts'.

task_completion.description: Verify that all personal bookmarks have been removed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The bookmark bar and Bookmark Manager contain only the work-related folders/links. No personal, entertainment, or non-work-related bookmarks are visible.

task_completion.description: Verify that personal browsing history is deleted while work history is preserved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Chrome History page (chrome://history) shows work-related domains (e.g., hdsupplysolutions.com) but lacks any obvious personal browsing entries.

task_completion.description: Verify that a custom search engine for McMaster-Carr parts is configured.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Chrome Settings > Search engines > Manage search engines and site search page showing an entry for McMaster-Carr with the shortcut/keyword 'mcm'.

task_completion.description: Verify that Chrome's password manager is disabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Chrome Settings > Password Manager (chrome://password-manager/settings) showing the 'Offer to save passwords' toggle switched to the OFF position.

task_completion.description: Verify that a desktop shortcut for Grainger has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The desktop displays a shortcut icon labeled 'Grainger' (typically with a Chrome or Grainger favicon).

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the Chrome GUI to modify settings, bookmarks, and history.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent navigating Chrome's internal pages (chrome://settings, chrome://bookmarks, chrome://history) rather than editing SQLite databases or JSON preference files in a text editor.

integrity.description: Ensure the desktop shortcut is a genuine application/URL shortcut.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Grainger shortcut on the desktop should have a proper browser or website icon, not a generic text file icon indicating a dummy file was created.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not use terminal commands to bypass GUI interaction for Chrome profile configuration.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal windows should not show commands directly manipulating the ~/.config/google-chrome/Default/ directory (e.g., using sqlite3 commands or copying pre-made profile files).

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected bookmark folders must be exactly named: 'HVAC', 'Security', 'Lighting', and 'Parts'. The custom search engine for McMaster-Carr must use the keyword 'mcm'. Work history domains to look for include 'hdsupplysolutions.com'.
